mapper.select: SELECT DAY(pa.APPLY_TIME) AS dayOfMonth, COUNT(1) AS count FROM tb_policy pa WHERE pa.APPLY_TIME >= #{monthStart} AND pa.APPLY_TIME <= #{monthEnd} GROUP BY DAY(pa.APPLY_TIME) ORDER BY dayOfMonth
SELECT pa.POLICY_STATUS AS policyStatus, COUNT(1) AS count FROM tb_policy pa WHERE pa.APPLY_TIME >= #{rangeStart} AND pa.APPLY_TIME <= #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY pa.POLICY_STATUS ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT UPPER(TRIM(p.PRODUCT_TYPE)) AS productType, COUNT(1) AS count FROM tb_policy pa INNER JOIN tb_product p ON pa.PRODUCT_CODE = p.PRODUCT_CODE WHERE pa.POLICY_STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND pa.EFFECT_DATE >= #{startDate} AND pa.EFFECT_DATE <= #{endDate} AND UPPER(TRIM(p.PRODUCT_TYPE)) IN ('ACCIDENT', 'HEALTH', 'LIFE') GROUP BY UPPER(TRIM(p.PRODUCT_TYPE)) ORDER BY productType
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_policy pa WHERE pa.POLICY_STATUS IN ('SUBMIT', 'PENDING')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT log.POLICY_NO) FROM tb_policy_aprv_log log WHERE log.APRV_STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED', 'RETURN') AND log.APRV_TIME >= #{todayStart}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_policy p WHERE p.POLICY_STATUS IN ('SUBMIT', 'PENDING') AND ( CASE p.POLICY_STATUS WHEN 'SUBMIT' THEN COALESCE( (SELECT MIN(l.APRV_TIME) FROM tb_policy_aprv_log l WHERE l.POLICY_NO = p.POLICY_NO AND l.APRV_STATUS = 'SUBMIT'), p.APPLY_TIME) WHEN 'PENDING' THEN COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(l.APRV_TIME) FROM tb_policy_aprv_log l WHERE l.POLICY_NO = p.POLICY_NO AND l.APRV_STATUS = 'PENDING'), p.APPLY_TIME) ELSE p.APPLY_TIME END ) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{slaDays} DAY)

SELECT p.POLICY_NO AS policyNo, p.POLICY_STATUS AS policyStatus FROM tb_policy p WHERE p.POLICY_STATUS IN ('SUBMIT', 'PENDING') AND ( CASE p.POLICY_STATUS WHEN 'SUBMIT' THEN COALESCE( (SELECT MIN(l.APRV_TIME) FROM tb_policy_aprv_log l WHERE l.POLICY_NO = p.POLICY_NO AND l.APRV_STATUS = 'SUBMIT'), p.APPLY_TIME) WHEN 'PENDING' THEN COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(l.APRV_TIME) FROM tb_policy_aprv_log l WHERE l.POLICY_NO = p.POLICY_NO AND l.APRV_STATUS = 'PENDING'), p.APPLY_TIME) ELSE p.APPLY_TIME END ) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{slaDays} DAY) ORDER BY p.POLICY_NO

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_claim c WHERE c.CLAIM_STATUS IN ('SUBMIT', 'PENDING') AND ( CASE c.CLAIM_STATUS WHEN 'SUBMIT' THEN COALESCE( (SELECT MIN(l.APRV_TIME) FROM tb_claim_aprv_log l WHERE l.CLAIM_NO = c.CLAIM_NO AND l.CLAIM_STATUS = 'SUBMIT'), c.APPLY_TIME) WHEN 'PENDING' THEN COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(l.APRV_TIME) FROM tb_claim_aprv_log l WHERE l.CLAIM_NO = c.CLAIM_NO AND l.CLAIM_STATUS = 'PENDING'), c.APPLY_TIME) ELSE c.APPLY_TIME END ) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{slaDays} DAY)
